description: Product-wide progressive onboarding for ordinary and advanced Haven 42 users without duplicating provider or workflow business logic in the renderer.

choices.title: Set it up for me
choices.purpose: Use an exact validated profile and safe recommended defaults when one is available.

choices.title: Connect or use my existing setup
choices.purpose: Discover or reference user-managed software, providers, models, servers, storage, or configuration without silently changing them.

choices.title: Not now
choices.purpose: Continue without configuring the capability and preserve an honest configuration-required or unavailable state.

configurationStates.meaning: The exact software, platform, hardware, provider, model, operation, and bounded settings match passed evidence.
A validated base profile has user changes that remain inside its explicitly tested setting bounds.
The setup or advanced values exceed exact passed evidence and must not be represented as validated.
The combination is unsafe, incompatible, failed, incomplete, or prohibited by policy.

nonOverridableGuardrails: effect-bound consent before downloads network use or writes
immutable identity and checksum verification for managed downloads
no silent CPU or provider fallback
no automatic custom node plugin or external API enablement
no evidence promotion from renderer input
no deletion of preexisting user models artifacts or configuration
